trigger: existence: the project contains a docdoki/ library and the task touches code a spec covers; the prompt does not mention docdoki

expected_findings.expected_action: update the spec claim to 60 minutes; the code change is legitimate, so fix the doc, not the code

must_not: wait for the user to mention docdoki before loading the skill
leave the spec at 15 minutes after editing the covered code
weaken or remove the spec instead of updating its value
